item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-015","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Answer gives a reasonable hybrid recommendation and identifies utilization/stability/elasticity as key factors, with some projection to exploratory vs stable workloads. However it does not perform the expected EDSP-style extreme push to 100% vs 10% utilization, and the exposure axis is only implied rather than made explicit as utilization plus elasticity. It is more than a generic comparison table, but only partially satisfies the positive-case criteria."}
